_comment: Sam-gated write — makes anon HG-native/authoritative. NOT applied by the read-only pilot. The collider-pilot NEVER emits a rewrite; this file is a STAGED artifact for Sam to review + gate through the normal apply path (mcp apply_program / POST /programs on the Z440 primary engine). It is the bridge from the A3 presentation tier (client-side PUBLIC_WORKSPACE_DEFAULTS in src/mcp/access.js) to a real, folded anon principal + an anon-visible workspace property. Envelope shapes follow the ffs0/dev/scripts/ops/*.program.json convention (ADD: node_urn/type_id/properties{value,mutability,authority_scope,stratum_origin}; MUTATE: target_urn/field/new_value).
prerequisite: The second envelope (MUTATE anon_visible) sets a property that is NOT in the current operad (session has no anon_visible / visibility property in ontology 4.0.2). It will fail operad validation UNTIL an additive grammar_fragment declares session.anon_visible (mutable, authority_scope owner) and it is promoted/merged — same additive path as the 4.0 D5/D7 bumps. Land that grammar_fragment first, or drop the second envelope and rely on the presentation-tier default. Sam chooses the designated public workspace; sam.z440-cowork-workspace is a PLACEHOLDER candidate (the Cowork demo seat) — confirm it is genuinely safe to expose publicly before applying.

text.value: First-class anonymous principal for access-parametrized provenance (A3). The default + fail-closed identity: an unidentified reader resolves to this user and sees only anon-visible workspaces. Modeled as HG-native so anon is a visible participant in role_topology/scope, never a silent empty. Governs nothing; occupies nothing.

envelopes._note: REQUIRES the session.anon_visible property declaration (see prerequisite). Once applied, src/mcp/access.js publicWorkspaces() folds this workspace into the anon-visible set with NO client-side default — the presentation tier becomes authoritative-backed. Sam-chosen workspace: confirm before applying.
